verse_text: Let Your ear be attentive and Your eyes open, that You may hear the prayer of Your servant which I pray before You now, day and night, for the children of Israel, Your servants, and confess the sins of the children of Israel which we sinned against You. Both I and my father's house have sinned.

pericope.title: Confession of the Sins of Israel

links.context: This begins the prayer of Nehemiah (1:24-2:18). See also [[NEH.1:5]]-11.

symbolic.title: Example: The Cherubim of Ezekiel I
